title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Babylonian Chronicle Series
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Babylonian Chronicle Series.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Babylonian Chronicle Series.

translation.text: From 'Babylonian Chronicle Series': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
